scores.correctness_notes: Covers all major points: notice types (custom, change-update), deduplication, pebble_custom_notice event, LazyNotice, container.get_notices/get_notice API, workload-side firing. Omits 'warning' type from gold standard but that's noted as 'not relevant in charming context'. Key format requirement for custom notices correctly stated.
scores.hallucination_notes: The Notice object attributes listed (repeat_after, expire_after, last_repeated, last_data, occurrences, etc.) and LazyNotice concept appear to be extrapolated/invented details not in the gold standard. The Juju env vars (JUJU_NOTICE_ID, JUJU_NOTICE_TYPE, JUJU_NOTICE_KEY) and 'pebbleNoticer worker' detail are not in the gold standard and may be hallucinated. ops >= 2.10 / Juju >= 3.4 version requirements not verifiable from gold standard.
